message:
fix(vdbe): cache decoded row payload for OP_Column; fix OP_Move overlap

OP_Column: Add a cached_row field to StorageCursor that memoizes the
most recent (payload_bytes, decoded_values) pair. When consecutive
OP_Column instructions reference the same cursor row, the payload is
decoded once instead of once per column. The cache is naturally
invalidated when the cursor moves (payload bytes change).

OP_Move: The previous implementation moved registers from source to
destination one at a time, which produced incorrect results when the
source and destination ranges overlapped (e.g., Move r3..r5 -> r4..r6
would clobber r4 before reading it). Now collects all source values
into a temp buffer before writing to the destination range.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
